notes: Found valid issues outside skill scope (.env not in .gitignore, firebase.json missing hosting). Used 3x more tokens than with_skill.
runs_build assertion fails in both configurations — eval agents run sandboxed. This assertion doesn't discriminate skill value and should be tested in a permissioned real session.
Skill produces 4x fewer tokens (21K vs 88K) and runs 3x faster (74s vs 221s) — targeted checks are much cheaper than open-ended review.
Without the skill, agents do thorough general reviews but miss all four targeted regression checks — they don't know to look for the codebase-specific patterns.
Skill correctly triggered from the vaguer 'sanity check' prompt in regression-introduced eval — description triggering is working.
Check 4 (60s expiry) requires judgment to exclude unrelated 60 literals — with_skill correctly filtered PaymentView display math and 15*60*1000 from being flagged.
all_pass assertion in clean-project was FAIL because a real regression existed at eval time (this.isBookingExpired) — the skill correctly caught it. Regression has since been fixed.
